task_completion.description: The new question is added to the 'Demographics' group
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey structure or question editor, the question text 'Which department do you work in?' and code 'dept' are visible under the 'Demographics' group.

task_completion.description: The new question is configured as a List (Radio) type
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the question settings or editor, the question type is explicitly shown as 'List (Radio)'.

task_completion.description: The correct answer options are added to the new question
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the answer options configuration screen for the 'dept' question, the options 'Sales', 'Engineering', 'HR', and 'Support' are listed.
The survey summary page shows the survey '2024 Employee Voice' as active (e.g., a 'Stop this survey' button is visible, or the status indicator shows it is active).

task_completion.description: The 15 original responses are restored to the active survey
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey summary page or the responses table shows a total of exactly 15 responses for the active survey.

integrity.description: The agent used the web interface to modify the survey and restore responses
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LimeSurvey web application rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to bypass the application UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show direct SQL commands (e.g., sqlite3, mysql) being used to alter tables or insert responses.

integrity.description: The restored responses contain the original seeded data
integrity.visual_evidence: If the response table is visible, it contains genuine original data (e.g., the comment 'The flexible hours are the best part of working here') rather than manually typed dummy entries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: '2024 Employee Voice'. Expected Response Count: 15. New Question Code: 'dept'. New Question Text: 'Which department do you work in?'.
